requirements.requirement: Provide clear, accessible privacy notices describing data collection, use, retention, disclosure, and disposal practices.
Obtain informed consent for personal information collection and processing, providing opt-out mechanisms.
Collect personal information only for identified, legitimate purposes with data minimization.
Limit use of personal information to stated purposes and enforce retention schedules with secure disposal.
Provide data subjects with access to their personal information and mechanisms for correction.
Monitor compliance with privacy policies and implement a process for handling privacy complaints.
